name: Community State Bank
description_short: Royal Center, IN's Community State Bank branch at 101 N Chicago St offers local banking services.
description_long:
Community State Bank's Royal Center, IN branch sits at 101 N Chicago St, serving this north-central Indiana community. The standalone facility provides convenient banking access for Royal Center residents and nearby customers. Hours are not published online, but the branch maintains regular business hours for standard banking transactions.

This Royal Center location offers core banking services including deposits, withdrawals, account inquiries, and customer support. Staff can assist with account questions and basic financial services. For specific operating hours or details about available products, visiting the branch directly is recommended.

Royal Center residents benefit from having local banking access without traveling to larger regional centers. Bring identification and your account information or debit card for any transactions. Community State Bank provides personalized local service to the Royal Center area.
services: Personal checking accounts (Kasasa Cash, Kasasa Cash Back, Kasasa Tunes, Simply Free, 50+ Checking)
Personal savings accounts and Christmas Club savings
Personal loans and personal term loans
Business checking accounts with interest options
Mobile banking with snap deposit capability
Online banking and digital account management
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Free Kasasa checking accounts that earn monthly cash rewards
Comprehensive loan portfolio including agriculture loans, SBA loans, and commercial real estate financing
Mobile banking with snap deposit feature for check deposits via phone
Multiple checking account options (Kasasa Cash, Kasasa Cash Back, Kasasa Tunes, Simply Free, 50+ Checking) to match different customer needs
Active fraud prevention education and scam awareness programs
Strong community involvement and local reinvestment commitment
AudioEye accessibility features for users with disabilities
cons: Limited to three physical locations in Indiana (Logansport, Walton, Kewanna), restricting in-person banking access for non-local customers
Specific APY rates, minimum balance requirements, and fee schedules not transparent on website
No information provided about competitive rates versus online banks or other regional institutions
Website does not disclose interest rates for savings accounts, CDs, or loan products
Limited transparency around rewards structure for Kasasa accounts (exact cash-back percentages and earning conditions not specified)

contact.address: 101 N Chicago St, Royal Center, IN 46978

best_for: Indiana residents in or near Logansport, Walton, or Kewanna seeking community banking relationships
Small business owners and farmers requiring specialized lending (agriculture loans, SBA loans, commercial real estate)
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured deposits and traditional banking with local accountability
Businesses needing remote deposit capture and comprehensive business banking services
diagnosis: Community State Bank is best for Indiana residents or business owners seeking traditional community banking with FDIC protection, local decision-making, and specialized lending options (particularly agriculture and SBA loans). The primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank operates only three physical locations in Indiana, making it inaccessible for in-person banking for most potential customers, and the website lacks transparent rate information making direct competitive comparison difficult.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
